rdf:Description.dc:description: Per-scenario wall-clock time for the four Op³ foundation modes (A fixed, B 6×6 stiffness, C distributed BNWF, D dissipation-weighted BNWF) and the OptumGX 3D FE reference, on a log-scale horizontal bar chart. Reproduces manuscript @tbl-walltime visually; witnesses the abstract's "five orders of magnitude" speedup claim.
